ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
title: Valid name and primary phone updates customer profile successfully
classification_rationale: This test validates the successful update of a customer profile with mandatory fields filled.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile exists with ID: CUST-10045.
steps: Navigate to the customer profile update page.
Enter Name: John Smith.
Enter Primary Phone: +1-555-0100.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Customer profile is updated successfully. HTTP 200 is returned.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage

ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
title: Blank name field returns inline validation error on Save
classification_rationale: This test checks the validation error when the mandatory name field is left blank.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile exists with ID: CUST-10045.
steps: Navigate to the customer profile update page.
Enter Name: .
Enter Primary Phone: +1-555-0100.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Name is required.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Designed to catch failures or misbehavior

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Valid unique email updates customer profile successfully
classification_rationale: This test validates the unique email requirement for customer profiles.

Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists with email: unique.email@example.com.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with new email.
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Customer profile is updated with new email: new.unique.email@example.com.

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Simultaneous updates cause sync issues
classification_rationale: Race conditions during profile updates should be tested to ensure data integrity.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists with valid profile data.
steps: Simultaneously update the customer profile from two different sessions.
Click the Save button in both sessions.
expected_result: One profile update is successful, and the other fails with a conflict error. CRM sync job reflects the successful update.
review_feedback: data_integrity: Data integrity checks are weak
transformation_accuracy: Transformation checks are weak
